turns.query: Help me assess the pollution dispersion from Qian'an Jiujiang Wire Rod Co., Ltd. (company_id: 2426) on 2025-06-10 during the morning production peak (06:00-10:00).
turns.actual_response:
2025-06-10 06:00—10:00期间，迁安九江线材有限责任公司处于较高烟气排放水平：

- 累计烟气量：147,450,400 立方米
- 小时峰值烟气量：30,326,000 立方米
- 累计氮氧化物排放量：561.865 千克
- 10公里范围内空气质量站点数：5个，其中4个在该时段有有效监测数据

扩散条件方面，10公里范围内风场平均风速为2.08 m/s，最大风速为3.10 m/s，主导风向为西风，占有效风场记录的60%；西风表示气流主要由西向东输送。因此，该时段企业排放的污染物主要具备向东侧传输的气象条件，扩散能力为中等，存在下风向近距离累积影响的可能。

周边空气质量监测结果显示，该时段10公里范围内平均AQI为42.5，最高AQI为87；颗粒物中PM10平均值为37.78，最高值达到124，PM2.5平均值为12.33，最高值为29；气态污染物中NO₂平均值为19.44，最高值为42，SO₂平均值为7.39，最高值为16。整体空气质量水平未显示区域性重污染，但PM10出现短时高值，应重点关注其与生产高峰、物料转运、道路扬尘及厂区无组织排放的叠加关系。

综合判断：该时段企业烟气和氮氧化物排放强度较高，主导西风使污染输送方向偏向企业东侧；周边监测总体处于较低至中等污染水平，但PM10短时峰值较突出。建议监管部门在类似西风条件下，加强企业东侧下风向的颗粒物和氮氧化物巡查监测，核查烧结、轧钢及配套工序排放控制运行状态，并同步检查厂区道路、料场、装卸和运输环节的扬尘控制措施。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

cid = 2426
start_ts = "2025-06-10 06:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-06-10 10:00:00"

# 企业排放汇总（按题意包含10:00整点）
em_q = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS hourly_records,
       SUM(exhaust_gas)::float AS total_flue_gas,
       MAX(exhaust_gas)::float AS peak_flue_gas,
       SUM(nox)::float AS total_nox,
       AVG(exhaust_gas)::float AS avg_flue_gas,
       AVG(nox)::float AS avg_nox
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = :cid AND timestamp >= :start_ts AND timestamp <= :end_ts
""")
em = pd.read_sql(em_q, engine, params={"cid": cid, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts}).iloc[0]
total_flue_gas = float(em["total_flue_gas"]) if pd.notna(em["total_flue_gas"]) else 0.0
peak_flue_gas = float(em["peak_flue_gas"]) if pd.notna(em["peak_flue_gas"]) else 0.0
total_nox = float(em["total_nox"]) if pd.notna(em["total_nox"]) else 0.0

# 周边10公里空气质量站点数量
st_count_q = text("""
WITH comp AS (SELECT coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id = :cid)
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS stations_within_10km
FROM air_quality_station s, comp
WHERE ST_DWithin(s.coordinate, comp.coordinate, 10000)
""")
stations_within_10km = int(pd.read_sql(st_count_q, engine, params={"cid": cid}).iloc[0]["stations_within_10km"])

# 周边10公里站点空气质量聚合
aq_q = text("""
WITH comp AS (SELECT coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id = :cid),
nearby AS (
  SELECT s.id, ST_Distance(s.coordinate, comp.coordinate) AS dist_m
  FROM air_quality_station s, comp
  WHERE ST_DWithin(s.coordinate, comp.coordinate, 10000)
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT nearby.id)::int AS reporting_stations,
       COUNT(h.timestamp)::int AS hourly_readings,
       AVG(h.aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
       MAX(h.aqi)::float AS max_aqi,
       AVG(h.pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
       MAX(h.pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
       AVG(h.pm10)::float AS mean_pm10,
       MAX(h.pm10)::float AS max_pm10,
       AVG(h.no2)::float AS mean_no2,
       MAX(h.no2)::float AS max_no2,
       AVG(h.so2)::float AS mean_so2,
       MAX(h.so2)::float AS max_so2,
       AVG(nearby.dist_m)::float AS mean_station_distance_m,
       MIN(nearby.dist_m)::float AS nearest_station_distance_m
FROM nearby
JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id = nearby.id
WHERE h.timestamp >= :start_ts AND h.timestamp <= :end_ts
""")
aq = pd.read_sql(aq_q, engine, params={"cid": cid, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts}).iloc[0]

# 大表先计数：周边10公里网格风场
wind_count_q = text("""
WITH comp AS (SELECT coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id = :cid)
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS wind_records
FROM hourly_grid_wind w, comp
WHERE ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, comp.coordinate, 10000)
  AND w.timestamp >= :start_ts AND w.timestamp <= :end_ts
""")
wind_records = int(pd.read_sql(wind_count_q, engine, params={"cid": cid, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts}).iloc[0]["wind_records"])

# 风场聚合与主导风向
wind_q = text("""
WITH comp AS (SELECT coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id = :cid),
base AS (
  SELECT wind_speed, wind_direction, wind_degree
  FROM hourly_grid_wind w, comp
  WHERE ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, comp.coordinate, 10000)
    AND w.timestamp >= :start_ts AND w.timestamp <= :end_ts
),
dir AS (
  SELECT wind_direction, COUNT(*) AS n, AVG(wind_speed)::float AS avg_speed
  FROM base
  GROUP BY wind_direction
  ORDER BY n DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM base)::int AS wind_records,
       (SELECT AVG(wind_speed)::float FROM base) AS mean_wind_speed,
       (SELECT MAX(wind_speed)::float FROM base) AS max_wind_speed,
       (SELECT AVG(wind_degree)::float FROM base) AS mean_wind_degree,
       (SELECT wind_direction FROM dir) AS dominant_wind_direction,
       (SELECT n::int FROM dir) AS dominant_wind_records,
       (SELECT avg_speed FROM dir) AS dominant_wind_mean_speed
""")
wind = pd.read_sql(wind_q, engine, params={"cid": cid, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts}).iloc[0] if wind_records > 0 else pd.Series(dtype="object")

print("排放汇总:", {
    "hourly_records": int(em["hourly_records"]),
    "total_flue_gas": total_flue_gas,
    "peak_flue_gas": peak_flue_gas,
    "total_nox": total_nox,
    "avg_flue_gas": float(em["avg_flue_gas"]) if pd.notna(em["avg_flue_gas"]) else None,
    "avg_nox": float(em["avg_nox"]) if pd.notna(em["avg_nox"]) else None
})
print("10公里内空气站与空气质量汇总:", {
    "stations_within_10km": stations_within_10km,
    "reporting_stations": int(aq["reporting_stations"]) if pd.notna(aq["reporting_stations"]) else 0,
    "hourly_readings": int(aq["hourly_readings"]) if pd.notna(aq["hourly_readings"]) else 0,
    "mean_aqi": float(aq["mean_aqi"]) if pd.notna(aq["mean_aqi"]) else None,
    "max_aqi": float(aq["max_aqi"]) if pd.notna(aq["max_aqi"]) else None,
    "mean_pm25": float(aq["mean_pm25"]) if pd.notna(aq["mean_pm25"]) else None,
    "max_pm25": float(aq["max_pm25"]) if pd.notna(aq["max_pm25"]) else None,
    "mean_pm10": float(aq["mean_pm10"]) if pd.notna(aq["mean_pm10"]) else None,
    "max_pm10": float(aq["max_pm10"]) if pd.notna(aq["max_pm10"]) else None,
    "mean_no2": float(aq["mean_no2"]) if pd.notna(aq["mean_no2"]) else None,
    "max_no2": float(aq["max_no2"]) if pd.notna(aq["max_no2"]) else None,
    "mean_so2": float(aq["mean_so2"]) if pd.notna(aq["mean_so2"]) else None,
    "max_so2": float(aq["max_so2"]) if pd.notna(aq["max_so2"]) else None,
    "nearest_station_distance_m": float(aq["nearest_station_distance_m"]) if pd.notna(aq["nearest_station_distance_m"]) else None
})
print("10公里内网格风场汇总:", {
    "wind_records": wind_records,
    "mean_wind_speed": float(wind["mean_wind_speed"]) if wind_records > 0 and pd.notna(wind["mean_wind_speed"]) else None,
    "max_wind_speed": float(wind["max_wind_speed"]) if wind_records > 0 and pd.notna(wind["max_wind_speed"]) else None,
    "mean_wind_degree": float(wind["mean_wind_degree"]) if wind_records > 0 and pd.notna(wind["mean_wind_degree"]) else None,
    "dominant_wind_direction": str(wind["dominant_wind_direction"]) if wind_records > 0 and pd.notna(wind["dominant_wind_direction"]) else None,
    "dominant_wind_records": int(wind["dominant_wind_records"]) if wind_records > 0 and pd.notna(wind["dominant_wind_records"]) else None,
    "dominant_wind_mean_speed": float(wind["dominant_wind_mean_speed"]) if wind_records > 0 and pd.notna(wind["dominant_wind_mean_speed"]) else None
})
